items.title: Nonprofit Health Services Organization Files Lawsuit Against Fortune 500 Pharmaceutical Company Over Prescription Drug Access
items.description: LAS VEGAS, January 20, 2026--Sagebrush Health Services, a nonprofit organization serving over 10,000 Nevada patients, has filed a lawsuit against Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ: AMGN), alleging that Amgen acted unlawfully by unilaterally terminating the sale of discounted drugs to Sagebrush’s clinics and improperly retracting millions of dollars in past discounts. These actions, Sagebrush maintains, temporarily prevented it from supplying its clinics with necessary medications from Amgen and other manufactu

items.title: Bernstein Downgrades Amgen to Market Perform, Maintains Price Target to $335
items.description: Bernstein  analyst Courtney Breen   downgrades Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) from Outperform to Market Perform and maintains the price target from $335 to $335.
